perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title card overlaying a blurred shot of a busy retail store with shopping carts; an animated character is visible on the left. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on store shelves or in refrigerators, including meat packs, paper towels, snacks, beverages, and household goods. (3) The products are shown statically or with slight pans, each accompanied by a prominent text overlay displaying pricing information. (4) The sequence concludes after cycling through dozens of items, maintaining a consistent editing style throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male narrator speaks with an energetic and rhythmic tone, announcing the product names and their discounted prices in sync with the visual transitions. (3) Occasional ambient sounds of a retail environment, like distant chatter or cart movements, are faintly audible under the music and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 秋季大特價 好市多 每週特價速報 09/15-09/21 記得追蹤我們' - Informative hook setting the context and dates. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Multiple overlays for every product shown, such as '美國特選 無骨牛小排烤片 原價1399/KG -150 特價1249/KG', listing original prices, discounts, and final prices in a variety-show style layout. (3) Functional Text: Specific end dates for certain sales, like '特價至 9/18', appear on individual items.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product showcase with pricing details -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple shoppers and staff visible in the background and at the beginning of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No specific main character; the focus is on the products and the off-screen narrator.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large warehouse-style retail store, featuring high shelves, refrigerated sections, and bulk product displays.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Itemized Discounts -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a promotional bulletin for Costco Taiwan, specifically highlighting limited-time discounts for the week of September 15th to 21st. It utilizes high-energy editing and narration to quickly convey value to shoppers and encourage them to visit the store or follow the content creator for future updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names products, shows their packaging, and lists specific price reductions available at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Specific 'Weekly Special' graphic template and high-speed price reporting style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets budget-conscious consumers in Taiwan by aggregating numerous deals into a short, digestible format.
